mapper.sql: id, event_key, out_order_no, order_number, trade_number, pay_amount, pay_time, event_type, event_status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_time, last_error, create_time, edit_time, status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_pay_order_event (event_key, out_order_no, order_number, trade_number, pay_amount, pay_time, event_type, event_status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_time, last_error, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{eventKey}, #{outOrderNo}, #{orderNumber}, #{tradeNumber}, #{payAmount}, #{payTime}, #{eventType}, #{eventStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, #{lastError}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM d_pay_order_event WHERE event_key = #{eventKey} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE d_pay_order_event SET event_status = #{retryingStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, last_error = #{lastError}, edit_time = #{now} WHERE event_key = #{eventKey} AND status = 1
UPDATE d_pay_order_event SET event_status = #{deadStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_error = #{lastError}, edit_time = #{now} WHERE event_key = #{eventKey} AND status = 1
